def: A long plain double-breasted outside coat for women.
The study of human nature. [R.] T. W. Collins.
Curled; spiral; helicoid; -- applied esp. to certain arteriesof the penis.
An appelation applied after the manner of a proper name to thefox. Same as Renard.
A group of Isectivora, including the colugo.
To angle, using flies for bait. Walton.
